pricing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricing.faq.q1: What are credits and how do they work?
pricing.faq.a1: Each AI hairstyle generation costs 10 credits. When you purchase a plan, credits are added to your account instantly. Use them to try any hairstyle or color combination.
pricing.faq.a2: For subscription plans (Monthly/Yearly), credits reset each billing cycle. One-time plan credits never expire — use them whenever you like.
pricing.faq.a3: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your account settings. You'll keep access to remaining credits until the end of your billing period.
pricing.faq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq.a4: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and Apple Pay through our secure Stripe payment processing.
pricing.faq.a5: Yes! You get 1 free hairstyle generation instantly — no sign-up required. After creating an account, you receive 20 additional free credits.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How does the AI hairstyle changer work?
faq.a1: Our AI analyzes your facial features and structure, then seamlessly applies your chosen hairstyle and color using advanced image generation technology. The result is a photorealistic preview that looks natural on your unique face.
faq.a2: We support JPEG, PNG, and WebP formats. For best results, use a clear, well-lit front-facing photo. The maximum file size is 10MB.
faq.q3: How many hairstyles can I try?
faq.a3: We offer 100+ hairstyles for women and 40+ for men, spanning every category from classic bobs and pixie cuts to braids, updos, and trending styles. New styles are added regularly.
faq.q4: What are credits and how do they work?
faq.a4: Each AI hairstyle generation costs 10 credits. You get 1 free trial instantly — no sign-up needed. After signing up, you can purchase credits: Lite (20 generations), Pro (300 generations/month or 300 one-time), or Ultra (600 one-time). Credits never expire.
faq.q5: Is my photo stored or used for AI training?
faq.a5: Your privacy is our priority. Photos are processed securely and encrypted. We do not use your images for AI model training. You can delete your history at any time.
faq.q6: Can I try different hair colors too?
faq.a6: Yes! Alongside hairstyle selection, you can choose from 20+ hair color options including natural shades, fashion colors, highlights, and more — or let the AI recommend the most flattering color for you.
faq.a7: Most results are delivered in under 30 seconds. Pro plan users receive priority processing for even faster results.
faq.a8: Absolutely. Every generated image can be downloaded in high quality directly from the results view or your history page.
faq.q9: What is the difference between Monthly, Yearly, and One-time plans?
faq.a9: Monthly and Yearly plans renew automatically and include a set number of credits per month. One-time plans are a single purchase with credits that never expire — ideal if you want to try many styles without a recurring commitment.
faq.a10: For subscription plans, credits reset each billing cycle. One-time plan credits never expire — use them whenever you like with no time limit.
